name: Care Transition Notification Procedure Codes
description: CPT codes for care transition notification services including transitional care management with communication to receiving provider within required timeframes, and initial comprehensive preventive evaluations used as proxy indicators for care coordination contacts. Used in care transitions and notification-related quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Transitional care management services with moderate medical decision complexity; communication within 2 business days of discharge, face-to-face visit within 14 days
Transitional care management services with high medical decision complexity; communication within 2 business days of discharge, face-to-face visit within 7 days
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation and management, new patient; infant (age younger than 1 year)
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation and management, new patient; early childhood (age 1 through 4 years)
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation and management, new patient; late childhood (age 5 through 11 years)
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation and management, new patient; adolescent (age 12 through 17 years)
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation and management, new patient; 18-39 years
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation and management, new patient; 40-64 years
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation and management, new patient; 65 years and older
